competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. competitions.product: WIN A VINTAGE ROLEX DATEJUST 16030 FULL BOX & PAPERS COLLECTOR'S SET
competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex Datejust 16030 Full Box & Papers Collector’s Set WIN A VINTAGE ROLEX DATEJUST 16030 FULL BOX & PAPERS COLLECTOR'S SET Value: £5,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Dated 1986 Max. Entries: 549 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 26/05/26 The Rolex Datejust is one of the all-time iconic wristwatches , loved by both seasoned and first-time collectors for its incredibly versatility , widely considered as the perfect everyday vintage Rolex . This example, reference 16030 , dates to 1986 and is in excellent condition . It came from the original owner as a full collector’s set , complete with its original inner and outer boxes, punched guarantee, booklets, tags, purchase receipt and more. 16.03% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 88 549 16.03% 461 Tickets remaining 461/549 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 6 Days 4 Hours 13 Minutes 32 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A 1986 ROLEX DATEJUST FULL COLLECTOR'S SET ENTER NOW 16.03% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 88 549 16.03% 461 Tickets remaining 461/549 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 6 Days 4 Hours 13 Minutes 32 Seconds Value: £5,500 Duration: 7 days Age: Dated 1986 Entries: 549 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 26/05/2026 The Rolex Datejust is one of the all-time iconic wristwatches , loved by both seasoned and first-time collectors for its incredibly versatility , widely considered as the perfect everyday vintage Rolex . This example, reference 16030 , dates to 1986 and is in excellent condition . It came from the original owner as a full collector’s set , complete with its original inner and outer boxes, punched guarantee, booklets, tags, purchase receipt and more. #26 - The Rolex Datejust 16030 Full Box & Papers Collector's Set 1986 The History— The Example The Rolex Datejust is one of the all-time iconic wristwatches. Loved by both seasoned and first-time collectors alike, the Datejust offers a rare balance of versatility, durability and timeless design, and is widely considered as one of the perfect everyday vintage Rolexes. This example, reference 16030 , dates to 1986 and is presented in very good condition . Featuring the distinctive engine-turned bezel and classic proportions that define the era, it has the charm collectors look for in a proper vintage Datejust whilst retaining a very clean, monochromatic look. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3035 automatic movement, this reference benefits from the introduction of the quick-set date function – a major step forward for the Datejust at the time and a feature that makes the watch far more practical for everyday wear. What makes this watch especially compelling is its provenance and completeness. Sourced from the original owner , it comes as a true full collector’s set , complete with its original inner and outer boxes (with reference sticker), punched guarantee papers, booklets, tags, purchase receipt and more – an increasingly rare thing to find nearly 40 years on. A wonderfully honest and complete vintage Rolex – timeless, highly wearable and exactly the sort of example collectors love to uncover. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets. Win a Rolex Datejust 16030 Full Collector's Set ENTER NOW Join Our Winners “Still can’t believe I won!” “I’ve entered a few competitions before but never thought I’d actually win — then I got the call telling me I’d won a vintage Rolex Submariner 5513! The watch is absolutely stunning. It’s got that classic charm and you can feel the history in every detail. The condition is immaculate for a piece of its age.
